title: PMWeather Storm Additions
description: A mod that aims to make Storms in PMWeather more dangerous
body:
# PMWeather Storm Additions
This mod is an addon to the new Protomanlys Weather Mod which aims to make the current storms more of a danger in general as right now tornadoes are really only the main threat, this mod will also aim to be highly configurable so you can disable and enable what you want.

# Current Additions
Right now the only current additions to this mod are to hail which are listed below
- Depending on hail level entities can now be damaged by it
- Blocks will break slowly in hail if intense enough

# Current issues
- Currently this mod will only affect the Overworld but this will be changed in the next update.

# What's next?
- Hail damage will be more configurable as right now it's based to be more realistic (so it can deal a lot of damage basically) so options for less damage will be added
- Still brainstorming on what to add next

# Other Information
- If you wish to make certain blocks not breakable by hail add them into protomanlys weather blacklisted tags/blocks
